    OSCE
    Clinical Data Analysis Examination
    0 / 100
    
  

  
  

    
Choose a Clinical Scenario

    
Each scenario presents a real healthcare data challenge. You will be graded across 4 stations. Use SQL to investigate. Hints are available but cost points.
